reason_for_decision: The article now covers mission definition, interface design, operator workflow, and acceptance planning in a way that makes it practically useful and strong enough to pass.
strengths: It starts from mission and response requirements instead of shopping for sensors first.
The interface-contract and acceptance-test sections materially improve execution value.
The piece keeps a neutral architecture tone and avoids unnecessary promotion.
summary_assessment: This version passes under the stricter standard. It is operationally useful, well structured, and technically credible.
